# Habit Tracker — Evey

> Free online habit tracker. Track daily habits with color-coded streaks, completion rates, calendar view, and progress charts. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://habits.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Productivity
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Track daily habits with one-tap completion
- Color-coded streak tracking
- Completion rate statistics
- Calendar view for habit history
- Weekly progress views
- Customizable habit categories

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
